Name: Pict Section Code
Tagline: Code editor and syntax highlighter wrapping CodeJar with two-way data binding to Pict AppData

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 96 96" width="96" height="96">

						<circle cx="34" cy="48" r="32" fill="#000"/></mask></defs>
					<circle cx="48" cy="48" r="32" fill="rgba(255,255,255,0.18)" mask="url(#_cr_48652)"/>

		<text x="48" y="50" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="central"

			fill="#ffffff" letter-spacing="-1">PSC</text>
